name: Smoked Salmon-And-Chive Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the cream cheese and butter until smooth and light.
2. Add the lemon zest and season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Stir in the chopped chives.
4. Lay out 6 slices of bread.
5. Spread half the filling on each slice.
6. Place overlapping salmon over the filling in an even layer.
7. Spread the remaining filling on top, then place the remaining slices of bread on each sandwich.
8. Trim off the crusts and cut into quarters.
